widget.name: IPTV Mac Stalker
widget.description: Fast IPTV client for LG webOS with Mac Stalker middleware support
widget.author: Kamel Kanane

webos:locale.name: en_US
webos:locale.webos:name: IPTV Mac Stalker
webos:locale.webos:short-description: Fast IPTV client for LG webOS
webos:locale.webos:description: Fast IPTV client for LG webOS with Mac Stalker middleware protocol support. Features editable playlists, channel categories, and smooth streaming.
